name: test_auth_proxy_integration_authorized
description:
arrange: Deploy jenkins, the authentication bundle.
    act: log in via IDP UI
    assert: the browser is redirected to the Jenkins URL with response code 200
descriptionHtml:
arrange: Deploy jenkins, the authentication bundle.
act: log in via IDP UI
assert: the browser is redirected to the Jenkins URL with response code 200
